raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "affirmation of personal agency and self-determination",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "individuals possess primary causal power over their own identity and development",
    "external influences are secondary to internal self-construction",
    "self-making is an active, ongoing process under personal control"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent as a concise assertion of agency but circular in presupposing the very capacity for self-making it asserts",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the recipient experiences it as empowering rather than blaming, has sufficient psychological resources to exercise agency, and the therapeutic context allows integration with acknowledgment of external constraints",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the statement is taken to imply total self-determination irrespective of genetics, trauma, socioeconomic factors or neurobiology, leading to unrealistic self-blame or denial of systemic influences"
}
